basic_details.job_title: HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 390 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA), Hamirpur
basic_details.post_name: Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) - Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Commerce
basic_details.department: Department of School Education, Government of Himachal Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: HPRCA Recruitment 2026: Get the latest HPRCA recruitment notification 2026 for 390 Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) vacancies under the Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA). The online application process starts on 13th April 2026 and the last date to apply online is 4th May 2026. Find HPRCA PGT vacancies for Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Commerce teachers in CBSE-affiliated government schools across Himachal Pradesh on the official website hprca.hp.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidate

important_dates.computer based test (cbt) date: To be notified later on HPRCA website

application_fee.obc_fee: Rs. 800/- (Rs. 100 Examination Fee + Rs. 700 Processing Fee)
application_fee.details: Candidates applying for the posts are required to pay a non-refundable application fee. The fee must be paid online only through Credit Card, Debit Card, or Net Banking. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.age_relaxation: As applicable as per Himachal Pradesh Government rules
age_limit.details: Candidates must be between 18 and 45 years of age as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Himachal Pradesh government rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application submission (16-05-2026, 11:59 PM). The educational qualification must be from a recognized University established under Central Act, Provincial Act, State Act or an Institution recognized by the UGC. TET qualification is mandatory for all teaching positions. Proficiency in teaching Hindi and English is required for all posts. Bonafide Himachali candidates must have passed Matric and 10+2 from HP School/Institution. | Post-Wise Educational Qualification | Common Requirements for All Posts: | B.Ed (≥50% marks) from recognized university TET (Teacher Eligibility Test) passed/qualified Proficiency in teaching Hindi and English language 5% relaxation in marks for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates of Himachal Pradesh Matric and 10+2 from HP School/Institution (except Bonafide Himachali candidates)

salary_details.nature of engagement: Purely temporary (5 years on Scheme basis)
salary_details.regularization: No regularization against sanctioned post of Education Department
salary_details.details: The selected candidates will receive a fixed honorarium/consolidated amount under the CBSE Scheme notified vide No. EDN-B-A(1)-3/2025 dated 01.04.2026. The payment is made for 10 months in an academic year. This is purely temporary and scheme-based employment for 5 years with no regularization claims applicable. Selected candidates will not be regular Government employees.

selection_process: S. No. Test Component No. of Questions Maximum Marks Duration
Objective Type Multiple Choice Questions (1 mark each)
1 Subject(s)/Field(s) up to the level of prescribed essential qualification(s) as notified in the advertisement 120 120 90 Minutes (1½ hours)
2 General Knowledge (including General Knowledge of Himachal Pradesh & Current Affairs), Everyday Science, Logical Reasoning, Social Science, General English & General Hindi (Matric Standard)
Relaxation (if number of qualifying candidates is less than posts) General: 40% | SC/ST/OBC/WFF: 35% (maximum 5% relaxation)

The selection process for HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026 consists of Computer Based Test (CBT) or Written Screening Test followed by Document Verification and Merit-based selection. Candidates who secure more than the prescribed minimum qualifying marks will be ranked in descending order on the basis of aggregate marks obtained in the CBT under their respective category.
Note: Each question carries 1 mark. For candidates appearing in multiple shifts
scores will be normalized using Z-Score Method (Mean and Standard Deviation Method) for merit list preparation.

Provisional Answer Key will be uploaded on the HPRCA website after the examination Candidates will have 7 days to raise objections Objection fee: Rs. 200/- per challenge Final Answer Key will be released after reviewing objections

Shortlisting for Document Verification based on merit obtained in CBT Final selection based on CBT marks + verification of original documents Category-wise waiting list/panel will be prepared: 25% for up to 25 posts 15% for 25-50 posts 10% for above 50 posts Recommendations valid till appointments are offered by the Appointing Authority Selected candidates liable to be posted anywhere within Himachal Pradesh State
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the HPRCA official portal accessible via the official website https://hprca.hp.gov.in. No offline application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 13-04-2026 (10:00 AM) to 16-05-2026 (11:59 PM). Candidates must complete One-Time Registration (OTR) before applying for the post.
Steps to Apply Online:
Step 1: Visit Official Website - Go to https://hprca.hp.gov.in
Step 2: Sign Up - Click "Sign Up" to create username and password

Step 3: One-Time Registration (OTR) - Complete OTR by filling: Personal details exactly as per Matric certificate Educational qualifications Work experience (if any) Upload recent passport-size photograph in prescribed format Upload signature in prescribed format
Personal details exactly as per Matric certificate
Educational qualifications
Work experience (if any)
Upload recent passport-size photograph in prescribed format
Upload signature in prescribed format
Step 4: Complete Profile - Ensure profile is 100% complete (mandatory for applying)
Step 5: Login and Apply - Login using credentials → View available posts → Select desired post (Post Code 26017/26018/26019/26020)
Step 6: Fill/Confirm Details - Review auto-filled application details from OTR profile
Step 7: Select Preferred Exam District - Choose preferred district for examination (HPRCA reserves right to allot any centre)
Step 8: Pay Application Fee - Pay through Online Payment Gateway (Credit Card/Debit Card/Net Banking)
Step 9: Submit Application - After successful payment, submit application and take printout for future reference
Important: A candidate can submit only one application against each post. Multiple applications are liable to rejection.
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Recent passport size photograph (as per specifications)
Signature (scanned image as per specifications)
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Document Verification (on being called):
Valid Call Letter and Photo Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card / PAN Card / Passport / Driving License / Voter ID / Bank Passbook with photograph / Employee ID etc.)

Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets: Matric certificate (for name, date of birth, and age proof) 10+2 certificate and mark sheet Graduation degree and mark sheets (with Botany & Zoology for Biology post) Post Graduation degree and mark sheets in relevant subject B.Ed degree and mark sheets (≥50%)
Matric certificate (for name, date of birth, and age proof)
10+2 certificate and mark sheet
Graduation degree and mark sheets (with Botany & Zoology for Biology post)
Post Graduation degree and mark sheets in relevant subject
B.Ed degree and mark sheets (≥50%)
TET qualification certificate (passed/qualified)
Category certificates (valid on closing date and date of document verification): SC/ST/OBC certificate EWS certificate BPL certificate Wards of Freedom Fighters certificate
SC/ST/OBC certificate
EWS certificate
BPL certificate
Wards of Freedom Fighters certificate
PwBD/PwD certificate (if applicable)
Domicile certificate / Bonafide Himachali certificate
Matric & 10+2 passed from HP School/Institution proof (for Bonafide Himachali candidates)
Downloaded Online Registration Application (ORA) form
Any other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification
Apply Online at: https://hprca.hp.gov.in/login
important_instructions: Cut-off date for determining eligibility (Essential Qualifications, Age, Experience) is 16-05-2026 (11:59 PM) Age reckoned as on 01-01-2026 (18 to 45 years) Candidates must be registered on One Time Registration (OTR) portal before filling Online Registration Application (ORA) Only one application per post is allowed. Multiple applications are liable to rejection Correction window available for 4 days after closing date with correction fee of Rs. 100/- Category once claimed cannot be changed after the correction window Keep mobile number and email ID active till completion of selection process Only Bonafide Himachali candidates are required to have passed Matric & 10+2 from HP School/Institution Reserved category certificates (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/BPL/WFF) must be valid on closing date of ORA as well as on date of document verification Reserved category candidates of other States will be treated as General (UR) category PwBD/PwD candidates can avail scribe/reader & compensatory time (20 minutes per hour) after prior approval from HPRCA Examination and processing fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances Admit Card will be available for download from website only (no postal dispatch) Candidates must bring downloaded ORA form + original certificates + valid photo identity proof at examination centre and document verification Provisional admission to CBT; final eligibility determined at document verification stage Mere submission of application or appearing in CBT does not guarantee eligibility Meritorious reserved candidates considered only in their reserved category (not in unreserved category) No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in CBT or document verification Waiting list valid for one year from date of recommendation Selected teachers appointed purely on Scheme basis – temporary (5 years), fixed honorarium only Selected candidates are not regular Government employees and will not be regularized against any sanctioned post of Education Department Service rules applicable to regular Government employees are not applicable to these appointments Canvassing in any form or use of unfair means will lead to disqualification and possible criminal action Selected candidates liable to be posted anywhere within Himachal Pradesh State Any dispute subject to Court jurisdiction of Himachal Pradesh only HPRCA reserves right to change terms, rectify errors, club posts, cancel recruitment, modify vacancies, or make any amendments Candidates are advised to visit https://hprca.hp.gov.in regularly for all updates regarding examination date, admit card, provisional answer key, objections, final answer key, results, document verification schedule, and other notifications

faq.question: Q1. What is HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026 is a state‑level recruitment drive by Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA) to fill 390 Post Graduate Teacher vacancies in Biology, Chemistry, Physics and Commerce for CBSE‑affiliated government schools in Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under HPRCA PGT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. A total of 390 vacancies have been notified for PGT Teacher posts, with 78 posts each for Biology, Chemistry and Physics, and 156 posts for Commerce as per Advertisement No. 07/2026.

faq.question: Q3. What are the application dates for HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. The online application process for HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026 will start on 13 April 2026 and the last date to apply online is 16 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for HPRCA PGT Teacher 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. Candidates must have a Master’s Degree in the relevant subject with at least 50% marks, along with a B.Ed degree with 50% marks, must have passed TET (conducted by HPBOSE or authorized agency), and should be proficient in teaching both Hindi and English; a 5% marks relaxation is available for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates of Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for HPRCA PGT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 45 years as on 01 January 2026, with upper‑age relaxation applicable to reserved categories as per Himachal Pradesh government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for HPRCA PGT Teacher 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. All categories have to pay a total of ₹800 per application, which includes ₹100 as examination fee and ₹700 as processing fee, while the correction fee for editing the application form is ₹100 per correction.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. The selection process consists of a Computer Based Test (CBT) or written screening test of 120 objective‑type questions (120 marks) followed by document verification, and final merit will be prepared on the basis of CBT marks only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the exam pattern for HPRCA PGT Teacher 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. The CBT will carry 120 multiple‑choice questions of 1 mark each with a duration of 90 minutes, covering subject‑specific questions up to the level of the essential qualification along with sections on General Knowledge (including HP GK and current affairs), Everyday Science, Logical Reasoning, Social Science, General English and General Hindi.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary or honorarium for HPRCA PGT Teacher posts?
faq.answer: Ans. Selected candidates will be engaged on a fixed honorarium of ₹30,000 per month, payable for 10 months in an academic year, under a scheme‑based appointment for 5 years, and they will not be treated as regular government employees.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for HPRCA PGT Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans. Candidates must first complete One Time Registration (OTR) on hprca.hp.gov.in, then log in, select the desired PGT post code (Biology, Chemistry, Physics or Commerce), fill the online application form, upload the required documents, pay the application fee online and finally submit and print the application form for future reference.
